The Band

The Conductor

🎼

M° Fulvio Dose

Conductor of the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

The Società Filarmonica is currently directed by Maestro Fulvio Dose, who leads the wind band ensemble with passion and expertise, keeping alive the bond with tradition while promoting innovation in the repertoire.

Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Founded in 1870, the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is one of the most traditional wind bands in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Member of ANBIMA FVG.
